evals.prompt: I just finished building a React+Vite+TypeScript dashboard. Run the testing wall on it before I deploy.
evals.expected_output: Paladin detects react-vite-ts profile, runs Tiers 1-5 sequentially, reports results with pass/fail/warn per check, and provides human checklist for Tiers 6-7 if automated tiers pass.

evals.prompt: This is a hotfix for a critical bug in production. Just test what's essential — I need to ship fast.
evals.expected_output: Paladin runs in hotfix mode (Tiers 1, 2, 5 only) — verifies build, unit tests, and security. Skips integration, edge cases, and human review for speed.

evals.prompt: I built a Python FastAPI backend. Run your tests on it.
evals.expected_output: Paladin detects python-api profile, uses pytest/ruff/mypy/pip-audit commands, runs all 5 automated tiers with Python-specific checks.

evals.prompt: Is this Rust WASM project ready to ship?
evals.expected_output: Paladin detects rust-wasm profile, runs cargo check/clippy/fmt/test/audit, checks WASM binary size, and reports verdict.

evals.prompt: Run paladin on this project but I want the full human walkthrough too — this is our first release.
evals.expected_output: Paladin runs full mode (all 7 tiers). After automated tiers pass, it produces the complete Tier 6 (accessibility/polish) and Tier 7 (final walkthrough) human checklists.
